title: vulpia dertonensis
intro: Vulpia dertonensis, also known as Derton Fescue, is a type of grass belonging to the Poaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Vulpia dertonensis include the potential to treat various conditions such as digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing its leaves and stems in hot water to create a tea or by using its essential oils in topical applications.
